hero.label: International company
hero.title: Plant-Based Formulas for Health

certificates.title: INTERNATIONAL QUALITY CERTIFICATES
certificates.description: Our products meet the most stringent international standards

products.title: OUR PRODUCTS
products.description: Innovative natural products for your health

micrystal.name: MiCrystal
micrystal.subtitle: Vision Care
micrystal.description: Cellular nutrition for eye health. 100% natural composition: elderberry extract, FloraGLO*, lutein and astaxanthin. Reduces eye pressure, relieves redness and dryness from prolonged screen work. Prevention of age-related vision changes.

greenmax.name: GreenMAX
greenmax.subtitle: Detox & Cleansing
greenmax.description: Herbal formula 3 in 1: intestinal cleansing, microflora restoration, liver protection. Prebiotics, probiotics, enzymes, fiber, antioxidants. Comprehensive body detoxification with natural ingredients.

mimax.name: MiMAX
mimax.subtitle: Anti-Aging
mimax.description: Powerful antioxidant #1 with astaxanthin. 6000x more effective than vitamin C. Slows cellular aging, protects from free radicals, strengthens heart and liver. Antioxidant protection for active longevity.

blumax.name: BluMAX
blumax.subtitle: Immunity & Brain
blumax.description: Blue-green algae AFA + vitamin C. 60+ minerals, neuropeptides, organic iron. Immunity boost, memory and concentration improvement. Comprehensive brain and vascular support with natural ingredients.

nutrimax.name: NutriMAX
nutrimax.subtitle: Protein Shake
nutrimax.description: Complete nutrition in one shake. Soy protein + spirulina + chlorella. For energy, post-workout recovery and weight management. Balanced plant protein for the whole family.

fleximax.name: FlexiMAX
fleximax.subtitle: Joint Health
fleximax.description: Comprehensive protection of joints, cartilage and bones. Plant-based glucosamine + turmeric + hyaluronic acid. Relieves pain and inflammation, restores mobility. Prevention of arthritis and osteoarthritis.

machoman.name: MachoMAN
machoman.subtitle: Men's Health
machoman.description: Cellular nutrition for men. Sexual function support, testosterone boost, stamina and energy. Maca + L-arginine + ginseng. Natural support for men's health and vitality.

mishroom.name: MiSHROOM
mishroom.subtitle: Mushroom Nutrition
mishroom.description: Mushroom product for complete nutrition. Meal replacement rich in vitamins and minerals. Immune support and overall body tone. Traditional mushroom medicine for modern lifestyle.

yekaterina.name: Ye-Katerina
yekaterina.subtitle: Women's Hygiene
yekaterina.description: Natural pads with aloe vera extract and silver ions. Antibacterial effect, protection from bacteria and odor. Comfort and safety for women's health every day.

mi-mask.name: Mi MASK
mi-mask.subtitle: Ginseng Face Mask
mi-mask.description: Ginseng face mask for skin nourishment, hydration and rejuvenation. Natural composition with ginseng extract for skin radiance, elasticity and youthfulness.

mi-serum.name: Mi SERUM
mi-serum.subtitle: Ginseng Cell Serum
mi-serum.description: Ginseng steam cell serum for deep skin nourishment and restoration. Activates cell renewal, improves skin texture, tone and elasticity.

magicare.name: Magicare
magicare.subtitle: Skin Care
magicare.description: Innovative skin care product. Comprehensive care for skin health and beauty with natural ingredients. Coming soon.

mifresh.name: MiFresh
mifresh.subtitle: Freshness & Hygiene
mifresh.description: Daily hygiene product. Freshness and cleanliness all day. Natural composition without harsh chemicals. Coming soon.

mitown.name: MiTOWN
mitown.subtitle: Cordyceps Coffee
mitown.description: Natural coffee with cordyceps. 100% Arabica with functional ingredients. Energy and vitality without side effects. Functional beverage for active lifestyle.

essential-oil.name: Essential Oil
essential-oil.subtitle: Aromatherapy Oils
essential-oil.description: Essential oils for aromatherapy and wellness. Natural oils for relaxation, recovery and creating a harmonious atmosphere. Aromatherapy for health and emotional balance.

relax.name: Relax Tea
relax.subtitle: Calming Tea
relax.description: Relaxing herbal tea. Natural composition for stress relief, sleep improvement and nervous system recovery. Caffeine-free. Soothing herbal blend for deep sleep.

miwellness.name: MiWellness
miwellness.subtitle: Wellness Product
miwellness.description: Product for a healthy lifestyle. Comprehensive body support for everyday well-being and prevention. Coming soon.

shaker.name: Shaker
shaker.subtitle: Shaker
shaker.description: Shaker for preparing cocktails and drinks. Convenient and stylish accessory for healthy nutrition and sports diet. Coming soon.

about.title: ABOUT THE COMPANY
about.description: M International is an innovative multi-national healthcare company based on the health ecosystem to build a quality life, a healthy environment, and a prosperous life for the community.
about.mottoText: Let Us Be The Bridge To Your Dreams — originated from a touching conversation between the founder and a young leader. It symbolizes the company's commitment to becoming a bridge that helps others realize their dreams.
about.sloganText: HURRAY! HURRAY! HURRAY! — is more than just a cheer. It represents a powerful energy of happiness, success, and abundance.
about.vision: Our Vision Is To Become World's No.1 MLM Company
about.visionSubtext: By revolutionizing the industry through cutting-edge technologies of the 21st century, science-backed premium products, an intelligent hybrid rewards system, and a member-centric strategy.
about.mission: We are committed to creating a new identity and standard within the MLM sector — reshaping its image, pioneering innovation, and contributing to the industry's credibility and social value on a global scale.
about.coreValueText: What we value most — beyond measure and beyond comparison — is the time we've invested, the memories we've created, and the journey we've built together.

business.title: THE BUSINESS LANDSCAPE
business.description: In today's rapidly evolving global economy — driven by globalization, the explosive growth of the internet, and unprecedented technological advancement — the way we do business has fundamentally transformed.
business.intro: M International stands at the forefront of this new era, offering a cutting-edge hybrid rewards system that empowers members with some of the highest earning opportunities in the industry. Our innovative system distributes 9 types of rewards.
business.rewardsTitle: Key Advantages Of Our Reward System

reward1.title: Equal opportunity for all
reward1.description: Whether you're a new or existing member, rewards are distributed based on performance, not seniority.

reward2.title: Hybrid smart system
reward2.description: Combining multiple layers of rewards, including dual binary structures.

reward3.title: Based on the principle of Win & Win
reward3.description: When you succeed, your team succeeds too.

business.memberDescription: Over the past five years, thousands of people across the globe have taken advantage of these real, life-changing opportunities.
business.memberQuote: In today's world, M International is the only company that can help you become a self-made dollar millionaire in the shortest time possible.
business.centricDescription: M International's member-centric policy highlights the role of emotional intelligence (EQ) in developing talent and leadership. We empower growth through personal potential, emotional drive, and strong relationships.

register.title: Register
register.description: Sign up as a member and get access to our product catalog and business tools.

training.title: Training
training.description: Complete our free training program to learn about products, sales techniques, and team building.

income.title: Earn Income
income.description: Start earning through product sales and team performance bonuses from day one.

cta.title: READY TO START?
cta.description: Contact us for a consultation on products and business opportunities

subscription.title: Ready to start your journey to health?
subscription.description: Subscribe to our newsletter and get exclusive offers and tips for a healthy lifestyle

aboutPage.title: About M-International
aboutPage.description: Learn more about M-International — international manufacturer of dietary supplements and wellness products. Our mission, vision and values.
aboutPage.visionText: Become the world's No.1 MLM company by revolutionizing the industry through cutting-edge technologies, science-backed premium products, and an intelligent hybrid rewards system.
aboutPage.valuesText: Quality, honesty, innovation and care for people are the foundation of everything we do. We value the time invested, memories created, and the journey we've built together.

businessPage.title: Business with M-International
businessPage.description: Discover opportunities for financial freedom with M-International. Hybrid rewards system, training and team support.

contactsPage.title: Contacts
contactsPage.description: Contact M-International for a consultation on products and business opportunities. We operate in 50+ countries worldwide.
contactsPage.addressText: No. 9-1, Jalan Tasik Utama 3, Medan Niaga Tasik Damai, Lakefields Sungai Besi, 57100 Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
contactsPage.officeHoursText: MON-FRI 10:00-18:00. Closed on weekends and public holidays.
contactsPage.note: We do not accept walk-in customers. Please contact us in advance for assistance.
